goal: Make the external CUDA operator packet name the verified CUDA training launcher as the primary external handoff so operators cannot bypass packet verification by following packet metadata.
head: 10ea0cb
blocked_scope: Changing model catalog pins, hashes, or release acceptance policy
Downloading or committing model weights, adapters, Docker images, endpoint transcripts, copied evidence bundles, or GO release evidence
Editing M6 review docs to GO
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may only route the external CUDA operator packet primary handoff to the verified launcher, update focused verifier/generator tests, refresh packet artifacts, update LLM context/working state, completion log, and PABCD contract.
required_commands: rg -n -- "primary_external_handoff.*verified_external_cuda_training_launcher.sh|recertification_primary_external_handoff.*verified_external_cuda_training_launcher.sh|verified launcher as the primary external handoff|real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint" scripts/build_external_cuda_operator_packet.py scripts/verify_external_cuda_operator_packet.py tests/scripts/test_build_external_cuda_operator_packet.py tests/scripts/test_verify_external_cuda_operator_packet.py artifacts/review/external_cuda_operator_packet.json artifacts/review/external_cuda_operator_packet.md artifacts/review/external_cuda_operator_packet_verification.json docs/CONTEXT.md docs/WORKING.md .codex/tasks/current.json
required_evidence: Operator packet still records artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.sh as the downstream training handoff.
Packet verifier rejects packets whose primary_external_handoff bypasses the verified launcher.
Packet verification remains GO for packet integrity only and warnings are empty.
Docs state that v0/M6 remain NOT_GO until real trained adapter no-fake endpoint evidence exists.
executed_verification_commands: rg -n -- "primary_external_handoff.*verified_external_cuda_training_launcher.sh|recertification_primary_external_handoff.*verified_external_cuda_training_launcher.sh|verified launcher as the primary external handoff|real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint" scripts/build_external_cuda_operator_packet.py scripts/verify_external_cuda_operator_packet.py tests/scripts/test_build_external_cuda_operator_packet.py tests/scripts/test_verify_external_cuda_operator_packet.py artifacts/review/external_cuda_operator_packet.json artifacts/review/external_cuda_operator_packet.md artifacts/review/external_cuda_operator_packet_verification.json docs/CONTEXT.md docs/WORKING.md .codex/tasks/current.json
warnings: This gate does not produce real trained adapter evidence or run CUDA training.
M6-RC and v0 release remain NOT_GO.

phase_notes.plan: Route the packet-level primary operator action through the verified launcher while retaining the training handoff as the launcher's downstream command.
phase_notes.audit: The current packet includes the verified launcher and recertification points to it, but packet primary_external_handoff and operator_sequence still name the lower-level training handoff.
phase_notes.build: Update packet generator/verifier expectations, focused tests, regenerated packet JSON/Markdown/verification artifacts, and LLM handoff docs.
phase_notes.check: Run JSON checks, focused tests, py_compile, packet build/verify, primary handoff assertion, evidence search, bootstrap m1-smoke, and diff checks.
phase_notes.done: After verification passes, stage, commit, and push this primary verified launcher routing phase.

pabcd.approved_scope: Route external CUDA operator packet primary handoff to verified launcher, update focused tests, regenerated packet artifacts, docs/CONTEXT.md, docs/WORKING.md, completion log, and PABCD only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product runtime/API/UI/DB/schema changes, no catalog pin changes, no release acceptance weakening, no M6 GO docs, no model/adapter/Docker/evidence bundle commits, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
pabcd.plan: Route the packet-level primary operator action through the verified launcher while retaining the training handoff as the launcher's downstream command.
